# awesome-dotfiles

> awesome-dotfiles is a browsable, filterable gallery of dotfiles ("rices") sourced from r/unixporn on Reddit, plus community GitHub submissions. Reddit has no way to filter posts by distro, window manager/DE, or colorscheme — this site exists to solve that.

## What it does

- Browse thousands of dotfile showcases with image galleries.
- Filter by Distro, DE/WM, Colorscheme, and Tools used.
- Search by post title or username.
- Sort by newest, oldest, or random.

## Site

- Site: https://dotfiles.lol
- GitHub: https://github.com/0xN1nja

## Maintainer

Built and maintained by Abhimanyu Sharma (0xN1nja).

## Contributing

- Submission: open a PR on the GitHub repo, adding a JSON file at `data/github/<github-username>.json`. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the template.
- Removal requests: open a PR on the GitHub repo.
